content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Jobtable: SDR, Trades Software (Base + Uncapped Commission) Anywhere in the World Ontario Sales and Marketing Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0170/7569/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://jobtable.com">https://jobtable.com</a> </p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Remote (Eastern Time Zone hours), Full-time</p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Jobtable builds software for contractors and trades businesses: plumbing, electrical, HVAC, roofing, general contractors. We're working toward being the standard software for more than 100,000 contractors across North America. Small team, fully remote, bootstrapped.</p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">This is a cold-calling role. You'll work leads we've already built through targeted lead generation, pre-qualified, not cold lists pulled from nowhere. The job, day one: book demos with the right contractors, the ones who actually convert into paying customers. That means qualifying calls properly instead of chasing volume for its own sake. Base salary plus uncapped commission on closed deals, so your incentive lines up with quality from the start.</p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>What you need to be good at this</strong></p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">You have to be a strong cold caller already. That's non-negotiable. You know how to read a contractor fast and adjust your energy to match theirs. You can handle an objection you've never heard before without freezing up. Trades guys will push back hard, talk over you, or hang up mid-sentence. Thin skin doesn't survive this job.</p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">You have to know how contractors actually work. You don't need hands-on trade experience, but you need real familiarity with the terminology and the daily grind, and a sense of what a plumber's or an electrician's business actually looks like day to day. Talk to these people like an outsider reading a script and they'll clock it immediately.</p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">You have to run a process without babysitting. That means a real follow-up cadence and clean CRM habits, tracked consistently without someone reminding you. You also need fluent spoken and written English, availability during Eastern Time Zone hours, a quiet space to work, reliable high-speed internet, and your own computer and headset.</p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>One hard requirement</strong></p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">You need to actually use AI in how you work, daily, not as a talking point. A sales coach agent you built yourself, an AI tool for call prep or objection practice, something real and in use. If you don't have this already, that's a real gap for this role.</p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>Where this goes</strong></p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">This starts as outbound and pipeline management, but it's built to grow. As you build real product knowledge (how Jobtable works, the technical side of the software, what problems it actually solves for contractors), you move into running demos yourself, then closing. Product knowledge is what separates a decent SDR from someone we build a real career here for. It's learnable. Wanting to learn it isn't optional.</p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Prior experience selling software or hands-on trade experience helps, but neither is required.</p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Base salary plus uncapped commission on closed deals. Paid time off. Fully remote.</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/jobtable-sdr-trades-software-base-uncapped-commission">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/jobtable-sdr-trades-software-base-uncapped-commission</a></p> Thu, 23 Jul 2026 10:28:20 +0000 Sat, 22 Aug 2026 10:28:20 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/jobtable-sdr-trades-software-base-uncapped-commission https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/jobtable-sdr-trades-software-base-uncapped-commission Coinbase: Senior Staff Software Engineer, Data Platform Anywhere in the World Full-Stack Programming Full-Time <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote - USA </p> <div class="content-intro"><p>Ready to do the most impactful work of your career? At&nbsp;<a href="https://www.coinbase.com/?utm_campaign=mt_o_m_w_m_m__coi_0_jd-onchain&amp;utm_source=coinbase">Coinbase</a>, we are uncompromising on our mission to increase economic freedom. The bar is high, the environment is intense, and we like it that way. This isn't a place for complacency, it’s a place to be pushed past your perceived limits. If you're ready to build the future of finance alongside people who refuse to settle for "good enough," you belong here. Coinbase is a remote-first, but not remote-only company. Expect to get together quarterly for intense in-person working sessions called “surges.”&nbsp;<a href="https://www.coinbase.com/careers">learn more about working at Coinbase</a>.</p></div><p class="mb-2 whitespace-pre-wrap">As a Senior Staff Software Engineer on the Data Platform team within <a href="https://www.coinbase.com/careers/product-groups">Platform</a>, you'll define and lead the technical strategy for Coinbase's data infrastructure, spanning ingestion, transformation, warehousing, streaming, and serving systems. This is a foundational role at the intersection of distributed systems, data engineering, and AI-readiness, reporting to the Senior Director of Engineering. You'll set architectural direction, drive multi-quarter roadmaps, and transition the organization from managed-service dependency toward engineering-built, platform-grade infrastructure that powers everything from fraud detection to modern multi-agent AI architectures.</p> <p class="mb-2 whitespace-pre-wrap"><strong>What you'll do:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Own the technical strategy and architecture for Data Platform, setting direction across data ingestion, transformation, warehousing, streaming, and serving systems while driving engineering-led cost reduction at the infrastructure layer.</li> <li>Architect data infrastructure to natively support AI and ML workloads, ensuring pipelines, data lake systems, and compute can power ML training, feature stores, real-time inference, and multi-agent AI architectures at scale.</li> <li>Drive the evolution to near-real-time data availability, enabling downstream teams across Coinbase to act on fresher data for fraud detection, financial reporting, and analytics.</li> <li>Build alignment and secure commitment from senior leadership and cross-functional partners across product, infrastructure, analytics, ML, privacy, security, and compliance on technical priorities and tradeoffs.</li> <li>Serve as the primary technical voice for Data Platform in
